Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows markedly elevated creatinine, proteinuria, and abnormal urine findings (cloudy, brown, low specific gravity), suggesting significant renal dysfunction, possibly acute or chronic kidney disease. Blood glucose is normal, but urine glucose and ketones are present, which is unusual with low HbA1c. Elevated chloride may indicate electrolyte imbalance. Recommend urgent nephrology evaluation and further workup for underlying renal pathology and possible tubular dysfunction.
